R0195.title: Telegram Bot Phishing
R0195.definition: As Web3 communities primarily use Telegram, attackers create fake official bots or hijack community groups to trick users into connecting wallets or revealing seed phrases.

references.title: H1 2025 Blockchain Security Report: Telegram Bot Phishing Risks

R0195.description: As Web3 communities primarily use Telegram, attackers create fake official bots or hijack community groups to trick users into connecting wallets or revealing seed phrases.
R0195.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
